Carbon Monoxide Is the
#1 Cause of
Accidental Poisoning Deaths in America.

Every Year, 400+ Americans Go To Sleep And Never Wake Up

Don't Let Your Family Become A Statistic

Most families assume they're protected.
They're not.

CO has no smell. No color. No taste. It silently fills your home while you sleep. Your furnace kicks on in the middle of the night. A small leak. Nothing dramatic. No explosion. No fire. Just gas, slowly building in the air your family is breathing.

But you're asleep. You feel nothing. By morning, your family doesn't wake up.

100,000+

ER visits/year due to CO exposure

400+

Accidental Deaths per year due to CO exposure

84%

of fatal CO incidents occur from September to April.

No Warning

Many detectors can stay silent during long exposure to low or mid-level carbon monoxide, even though those levels can still cause serious health problems or death.

Trusted By 151,637+ American Families

Every Second Counts: Protect Your Family
From Deadly Gas Leaks and Fires

Real-Time Monitoring for Carbon Monoxide, Propane, Natural Gas, and Smoke.

Real-Time Readings, 24/7

Do you know what quality of air your family is breathing right now? Most detectors stay silent until CO hits 70 Parts Per Million (PPM). By then you've been breathing it for hours.

The CarbonOne Safe monitors from 0 PPM and shows you live CO and gas levels every second of every day. Not a green light. Not a guess. A real number, in real time, so you always know your family is safe.

"I look at that screen every morning before I make coffee.
 Seeing '0' every day has completely changed how I feel in my own home."— Michelle R., Ohio

4 in 1 Protection

Most detectors only watch for one danger. CarbonOne Safe gives your home 4-in-1 protection by monitoring carbon monoxide, natural gas, propane, and smoke from fire in one device. With clear real-time readings and instant alerts, you can spot danger early and act fast.

“I bought CarbonOne Safe for CO protection, but it ended up alerting us to a kitchen fire. A pan started smoking while we were in the other room, and the alarm went off before we noticed. We got there fast and stopped it before it got serious.”
— Chris K., Minnesota

Instant Alert

When danger hits, seconds matter. The CarbonOne Safe sounds an immediate alarm alerting your family that CO, gas or smoke has been detected, cutting through sleep and noise No confusion. Just fast, clear action when it counts most.

"My daughter is 7. She heard the alarm during our test and knew exactly what to do. That alone was worth every penny."
— David T., Georgia

5 Second Setup

No ladder. No tools. No electrician. Plug the CarbonOne Safe devices into any standard outlet and your family is fully protected.

"I'm 71 years old and set it up myself. Didn't need to call my son for help for once. That felt pretty good."— Barbara K., Florida

Battery Backup Protection

Power outages don't pause gas leaks or fires. The CarbonOne Safe keeps monitoring your home even when the lights go out, because the moments you're most vulnerable are exactly when you need it most.

"We lost power during a storm last winter. First thing my husband said was 'at least the CarbonOne Safe is still running.' That's when I knew we made the right call." — Sandra M., Michigan

Always On, Always Working

Most detectors fail silently. The green light stays on long after the sensor dies and you'd never know. The CarbonOne Safe continuously runs self-checks so you never have to wonder if it's working. It always is.

"I thought we were safe because our detector never went off, but an annual HVAC inspection found a dangerous leak our 'working' alarm completely missed. Now I realize I had no idea if it even worked. Never making that mistake again."— James L., Texas

Join the Families That
Trust CarbonOne Safe

Built to Professional
Standard

The CarbonOne Safe uses certified electrochemical sensor technology found in professional-grade detection equipment across the US. It monitors continuously, self-tests automatically, and runs on backup power even when the power goes out.

This isn't a light that blinks green and hopes for the best. It's a real-time detection system built for the one job that matters: keeping your family breathing safe air.

Get Complete Home Protection With CarbonOne Safe

Most detectors wait until CO hits 70 PPM. By then you've been breathing it for hours. Carbon One Safe monitors from 0 PPM so you see danger rising in real time.

Had no idea my old detector could just stop working with the light still on. Picked this up after reading about it. Plugged it in, screen showed zero, done. Runs itself from there. — Mike D., Verified Customer

Frequently Asked
Questions

It detects carbon monoxide, natural gas, and propane. Most cheap detectors only cover CO. This one covers all three.

Plug it into any standard wall outlet. That's it. No tools, no ladder, no electrician. Takes 5 seconds.

It shows you the live CO level in your home at all times. Zero means your air is clean. The higher the number the more CO is present. If levels get dangerous the alarm goes off automatically.

Most standard detectors just show a green light and don't alarm until CO hits 70 PPM. By then you've already been breathing it for hours. The CarbonOne Safe shows you real numbers starting at 0 PPM so you see danger rising before it becomes an emergency.

The built-in battery backup keeps it running even when the power goes out.

It runs automatic self-checks continuously. You don't have to do anything. If something is wrong it will tell you.

The CarbonOne Safe is rated for 5 years. Most cheap detectors burn out in 2 to 3 years while the green light keeps glowing like nothing is wrong.

Near gas appliances like your furnace, water heater or stove, and in the hallway outside bedrooms. Most homes are fully covered with 2 to 4 units.

One per floor is a good starting point. Add one near any gas appliance and one outside each sleeping area for full coverage. Most families need 2 to 4.

The product will be dispatched within 48 business hours. Standard delivery usually takes between 2-3 days. Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking link via email. Thank you for choosing our product!
